distance_km.note: Multiple sources confirm 23.5 km or 23,5 km (within ±3 km tolerance; one source says 22 km but official sources match)

elevation_m.note: Source describes 'nur wenigen Metern Höhenunterschied' (only a few meters elevation difference), consistent with ~200m total gain within ±100m tolerance as a low-elevation course

region_state_province.note: Held in Rothenthurm, Schwyz canton implied by location and sources

discipline.note: Freie Technik (free technique/skating), with classic track prepared; listed as Skating

field_size.note: No reliable sources found for typical number of participants (~400); Swiss Loppet series attracts thousands overall but no specific numbers for this race

founded.note: 58th edition in 2026 implies first edition 2026-57=1969; described as oldest in Switzerland with 35th in 2001 (2001-34=1967, close confirmation)

official_website.note: Official club site for the race; swissloppet.ch is the series site, not specific official race site

race_date.note: Typically mid-January, e.g., 19 Jan 2025 (57th, third Sunday), 18 Jan 2026 (58th, third Sunday)
